name: Wireless Charging Stand & Pencil Cup Dark Brown - Threshold™: Desk Organizer, Office Supplies, Faux Leather
description:
Add luxe, convenient style to your workspace with the Wireless Charging Stand and Pencil Cup from Threshold™. This dark brown charging stand and pencil cup is made with a mix of faux leather, plastic and wood for an amazing look. The wireless charging stand comes with multiple ports for charging of your mobile phone and more while you're working.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
